name: whois-rdap
desc: A simple command-line tool to query RDAP servers for IP address information.

name: LANwatch
desc: A Rust library and CLI tool for network device discovery and tracking via DHCP, mDNS, and IEEE-OUI identification.

name: NetOrigin
desc: NetOrigin is a small Rust CLI for retrieving network ownership data and IP ranges.

name: iManager
desc: Advantech iManager Linux driver set for Advantech Embedded Boards

name: appid_finder
desc: A Rust-based web application that discovers iOS and Android app bundle IDs instantly.

name: android-appid
desc: A command-line tool written in Rust to find the application ID of an Android app from the Google Play Store.

name: ios-appid
desc: A Rust library and CLI to fetch iOS app information from the iTunes API.
